title: api: handle nil pointer dereference in api endpoints
body:
When `?all=garbage` is passed to /libpod/images/prune the schema
validation fails and err is nil, but is used in Wrapf causing a nil
pointer dereference.

Signed-off-by: Jelle van der Waa <jvanderwaa@redhat.com>

comments.body: @jelly the CI isn't happy as you didn't add a new test.  If you cannot add one, then you need to add the tag `[NO TESTS NEEDED]` to the description of the PR to make the CI happy.
LGTM Once you get the tests to pass.
